notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.

/debug/core-timings remains available for comparing renderMs and deliveryMs.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify coreCallbackAck400SilentReady=true, retest timings, then begin connecting real section data adapters into Core sections.
